snp5.19:1.1:
Ven. Piṅgiya:
“I will recite ‘To the Far Shore.’
snp5.19:1.3: As he saw, so he taught—
snp5.19:1.5: the Nāga with no sensuality, no forest:
snp5.19:1.6: For what reason would he tell a lie?
snp5.19:2.4: Let me praise his beautiful words.
snp5.19:3.1: He who is truly described as dispeller of darkness, awakened, All-around Eye,
snp5.19:3.2: gone to the end of the cosmos, all his becoming transcended,
snp5.19:4.1: As a bird leaving a scrubby grove
snp5.19:4.2: would dwell in a forest abundant in fruit,
snp5.19:4.3: even so, I have left those of next-to-no vision,
snp5.19:4.4: have arrived like a swan at a large lake.
snp5.19:5.3: when anyone explained ‘It is,’ ‘It will be,’
snp5.19:5.4: all that was hearsay, quotation marks.
snp5.19:5.5: All that promoted conjecture and gave me no pleasure.
snp5.19:6.1: Sitting alone— the dispeller of darkness,
snp5.19:7.4:
whose likeness is nowhere at all.”
Bāvarī:
“Piṅgiya, for even a moment
snp5.19:8.1: can you stay apart from him—
snp5.19:9.4:
whose likeness is nowhere at all?”
Ven. Piṅgiya:
“No, brahman, not even for a moment
snp5.19:10.1: can I stay apart from him—
snp5.19:11.4: whose likeness is nowhere at all.
snp5.19:12.1: I see him with my heart as if with my eye—
snp5.19:12.2: heedful, brahman, by day & by night.
snp5.19:12.3: I spend the night paying homage to him,
snp5.19:12.4: and that way, as it were, not staying apart.
snp5.19:13.3: To whatever direction he goes, the one deeply discerning,
snp5.19:13.4: to that direction I bow down.
snp5.19:14.1: I am old, my stamina frail,
snp5.19:14.2: which is why my body doesn’t run away to there.
snp5.19:14.3: But through the machine of my resolves I constantly go,
snp5.19:14.4: for my heart, brahman, is connected to him.
snp5.19:15.2: I swam from island to island,
snp5.19:15.3: but then I saw the One Self-Awakened,
snp5.19:16.3: so will you show your conviction, Piṅgiya.
snp5.19:16.4: You will go beyond the realm of death.’
snp5.19:17.1: I feel confidence all the more,
snp5.19:17.2: having heard the words of the sage,
snp5.19:18.2: he knows all dhammas, from high to low:
snp5.19:18.3: the Teacher who puts an end to the questions
snp5.19:19.2: whose likeness is nowhere at all:
snp5.19:19.3:
Yes, I will go there.
I’ve no doubt about that.
snp5.19:19.4: Remember me thus as one whose mind is decided.
